'''Data Equity Management, Inc.''' was a major corporation on [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]], secretly founded by [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]]. They offered storage and maintenance of other corporations' confidential data, and later handled sector-wide census information in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]].

{{Company-stub}}
